utterance: What was Kristaps Porzingis shooting percentage from the paint?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Porzi%') AND ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE p.name = 'Kristaps Porzingis' AND ABS(sc.x) <= 80 AND sc.y <= 190

utterance: How does that compare to his 3-point percentage?
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 THEN 'paint' WHEN shot_type = '3PT Field Goal' THEN '3pt' END as zone, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Porzi%') AND (ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 OR shot_type = '3PT Field Goal') GROUP BY zone
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE p.name = 'Kristaps Porzingis' AND sc.shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'

utterance: How does paint FG% compare to mid-range FG%?
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 THEN 'paint' WHEN distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22 THEN 'mid_range' END as zone, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE (ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190) OR (distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22) GROUP BY zone
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 AND made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paint_fg_pct, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22 AND made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / SUM(CASE WHEN distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mid_range_fg_pct FROM shot_charts
